name: First Cash Pawn
description_short: Essex, MD First Cash Pawn at 1235 Eastern Blvd offers quick cash for jewelry, electronics, and more with extended weekday hours.
description_long:
First Cash Pawn in Essex, MD is located at 1235 Eastern Blvd, serving the Baltimore County area with convenient access to local neighborhoods. The Essex location is open Monday through Saturday from 10 AM to 6 PM, making it easy to stop by after work or on weekend errands. As a standalone pawn shop, this Essex venue specializes in quick cash transactions for items you no longer need.

At the 1235 Eastern Blvd location in Essex, the team buys and loans against jewelry, electronics, tools, musical instruments, and other valuables. Whether you need cash quickly or are looking to pawn an item temporarily, you can reach this Essex location at +1 410-574-7296 to ask about current rates and terms. The staff can evaluate your items and provide quotes over the phone or in person.

If you're an Essex resident looking to convert items into immediate cash, bring a valid ID and the items you wish to pawn or sell. The process is straightforward: walk in, get your items evaluated, and walk out with cash the same day. First Cash Pawn at this Essex, MD location has built trust with Baltimore County customers by offering fair prices and transparent loan terms.
pros: Over 3,300 retail locations across 29 U.S. states, DC, UK, and Latin America—exceptional accessibility and convenience
Fast pawn loans available with no credit check required—same-day funding for qualified items
Non-recourse loans secured by collateral—borrowers not personally liable for loan repayment beyond losing pledged item
Buys almost anything of value including jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, and musical instruments
Layaway service available with just 10% down payment for budget-conscious shoppers
Gold and precious metal purchasing service provides immediate cash for items many households own
Publicly traded company (S&P MidCap 400 and Russell 2000) with corporate accountability and regulatory oversight
cons: Pawn loans require surrendering personal property as collateral—item is lost if not redeemed within timeframe
Implicit interest rates through redemption premiums can be high; total cost of borrowing not transparently disclosed on website
No mention of APR disclosure, loan terms, redemption periods, or fee structures—critical borrowing details absent from public information
Non-recourse structure means no legal recourse against borrower but item forfeiture can create hardship for those unable to redeem
Limited financial products—pawn loans and merchandise sales only; no credit-building, debt management, or financial counseling services
best_for: Individuals with valuable items (jewelry, electronics, instruments) who need immediate cash and want to avoid credit checks
Cash-constrained consumers who prefer collateral-based lending over unsecured personal loans or payday loans
People seeking to buy discounted merchandise or layaway items affordably through the retail pawn store network
Those with gold, silver, or platinum looking to convert precious metals into immediate cash without shipping delays
diagnosis: FirstCash is best for cash-constrained consumers who have valuable personal property they can temporarily pledge and need immediate funding without credit checks or traditional lending requirements. The primary caveat is that pawn loans involve collateral risk—if you cannot redeem your item within the redemption period, you lose it permanently—making this suitable only for items you can afford to forfeit and borrowing situations where traditional credit access is unavailable.
services: Pawn loans secured by personal property (jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, musical instruments)
Gold, silver, and platinum buying service with immediate cash payment
Retail merchandise sales (bought and resold inventory)
Layaway service with 10% down payment option
Item appraisal and valuation for pawn loans
Store locator to find nearest location among 3,300+ stores
Online inventory browsing of available merchandise for sale
Lease-to-own and retail finance payment solutions through subsidiary AFF (15,000+ merchant partners)
Non-recourse pawn loan structure (no personal liability beyond collateral)
Cash on-the-spot payment for items sold or pawned
Multi-currency operations across U.S., UK, Mexico, Guatemala, Colombia, and El Salvador
Point-of-sale technology solutions for retail merchant partners
meta_description: First Cash Pawn at 1235 Eastern Blvd, Essex, MD. Quick cash for jewelry, electronics, and valuables. Open Mon–Sat 10AM–6PM.
